site.title: Agentic SDLC Personas
site.tagline: 24 personas for the agent-augmented software lifecycle
site.slogan: Pioneering software development with Agentic DevOps

home.heroSubtitle: A field-tested role catalog for teams delivering with AI assistants, Copilot and autonomous agents. Each persona comes with a playbook, an MCP manifest, and a ready-to-run kit.
home.whyBody: Agents change who does what. A developer is no longer just writing code, a QA is no longer just writing tests, a product owner is no longer just writing stories. These 24 personas capture the new distribution of responsibility when AI is in the loop.
home.chaptersSubtitle: Each cluster groups personas that share an accent color, a phase of the SDLC, and a failure mode.
home.integrationBody: Every persona ships with a kit: an MCP manifest, Copilot instructions, prompt library, and local validation scripts. Kits are tested and versioned.
home.interactiveBody: Navigate by cluster, by SDLC phase, or by accent color. Each persona links to its full document and to its executable kit on GitHub.
audienceList: Engineering leaders rewriting role definitions for the agent era
Platform teams building MCP servers and Copilot extensions for their org
Staff engineers and architects drafting internal agent playbooks
DevRel, enablement and HR teams scoping training programs for AI-native delivery

footer.madeBy: Written by Paula Silva, AI-Native Software Engineer.
footer.license: Content licensed MIT. Kits and prompts free to adapt.
footer.designSystem: Built with the paulasilvatech Design System.
